title: Postbiotics: What They Are and Why Your Gut Needs Them After 40
tags: postbiotics, gut health, prebiotics probiotics postbiotics, women over 40, gut bacteria, short chain fatty acids, immunity
excerpt: Probiotics get all the attention, but postbiotics are the bioactive compounds that may actually drive the gut health benefits. Here is what they are, why they matter especially after 40, and how to support their production.
seo_title: Postbiotics for Women Over 40: What They Are and Why They Matter
meta_description: Postbiotics are the next frontier of gut health. Learn what they are, how they differ from probiotics, and why women over 40 especially need them for immunity and gut barrier health.
author: Happy Aging Team
